modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Surface Pro screen intermittently blurry and flashing.

full_description_text: The user reported that the screen on their Surface Pro is going blurry at times. They also mentioned that the bottom of the device flashes, which is causing concern. This issue occurs while using external displays, and it seems to happen randomly during use.
short_description: Surface Pro screen intermittently blurry and flashing.
description: The user reported that the screen on their Surface Pro is going blurry at times. They also mentioned that the bottom of the device flashes, which is causing concern. This issue occurs while using external displays, and it seems to happen randomly during use.
